description_text: Product Overview Detail Feature: Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Adhesive installation with some drilling by bodyshop, is easy to apply for most cars. Modification&cutting required to fit properly. Specification: Material:ABS Plastic Size:66 x 13.5cm Color:Black Universal fit for vehicles Package Included: 1 x Car Rear Bumper Spoiler cover 1 x Double Sided Tape set of screw Reviews Shipping Policy Payment Mathord Returns Policy About Feedback Item will be shipped out within 48 hours upon receipt of your payment. We ship the item through Hong Kong Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging. Normally, the item will arrive in 15-20 days. But sometimes it takes a little bit longer, goes to 20-30 days or more.
